RULING; Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling.GRANT DEFAULT IMPROPER THEREFORE JUDGMENT VOID.Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/REQ/PB)BELDON YEE #2647

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Off Calendar

Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Joyce Frederich, Esq. for Plaintiff: Allison Sutfin, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Fefugio R. Reyes as follows:
Damages $9,381.00
Costs $767.93, for a total of $10,148.93
Judgment signed in open court.
